reviews.review_description: Needs snap view to ease motion sickness but most of all needs the balls to appear in hand with a trigger click so you don't have to tediously reach for them as excellently  showcased in premium bowling. Until then, wife and i cant play it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback! We are working on implementing fixes to these two issues and will hopefully be able to update the game soon. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
Fun, easy to pick up and play, and realistic. Really enjoy this and trying to beat my top score.The new upstairs arcade environment is awesome . I like the suggestion of a “force pickup” and YouTube browser too. Those will be nice enhancements.

Question for developer(s) - is there a way to remove the white line coming from my hand when I release the ball? It’s distracting & takes away from the realism. I don’t see it in the gameplay trailers so I’m assuming there’s a way to disable it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! There isn't currently a way (not sure why they don't show up in the trailer), but I will definitely get that implemented. Thanks for the idea!

reviews.review_description: This game needs more exposure!  Three tables, each with a leaderboard, and now with 4-player multiplayer (private rooms), with its own look and feel.  This is such a solid game.  I highly recommend this for everyone who's a fan of skeeball.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review!

reviews.review_description:
Fun game and worth the $5. Three options to choose from.

Update 01/25: love the new arcade update, fun to play in a new environment. 

I’d love to have music playing at each of the three skeeball options (like there’s is carnivals music for the moving ducks one)and /or an option to play YouTube from within the game itself

developer_response.body: Thank you for the updated review! And for the great idea - I'll have to look into that!

reviews.review_title: Not sure how to contact developers
reviews.review_description: When I point to the green spots I end up in the game, like up on the skeeball platform.  how do you position yourself in this game?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! If you press and hold the Oculus button (the one right under the thumbstick on the controller) it should reset your position.

There is currently an issue where physically moving away from where you start will cause you to be in strange places after teleporting. We're looking into a fix for that, but hopefully this will help you in the meantime. 

We will also add some info on how to contact us, so thank you for that feedback as well!

reviews.review_description: I have been waiting for a skee ball game for the quest for quite a while.  Finally there is one and it doesn't disappoint.  I like the different variations to the game to keep it from going stale.  I currently have the high scores for each variation of the game so download the game and try to beat me.  The other game I would love to see is candle stick bowling which would fit nicely with the skee ball game and would use the same type of ball.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback and for the suggestion! I hadn't heard of candle stick bowling before, and I agree that it would be a great fit! I've started to put a candlestick bowling game together, but I've also been working on getting multiplayer support set up, which is taking a while. Hopefully will have a good update soon!

reviews.review_description:
I honestly bought this solely for the purpose of being allowed to leave a review… the game is honestly great for $5 but the developer is missing out BIG TIME by not making this multiplayer.  The physics are just about perfect, and it’s really smart to offer 3 different types of tables. It feels like a huge missed opportunity though, and even worse, a waste of great physics, to be only single player.  This honestly feels like a ForeVR level game if you only added some features and achievements…. And MULTIPLAYER. Have I made my point yet? Lol. 

2 changes though:  #1 add the option to make the table closer to ground level… even at the lowest level it feels a tad high. 
#2 Add Force Grab so I don’t have to constantly bend all the way down to pick the balls up. Just let me point and click. 

Other than that, $5 is fair asking price for what’s offered right now.  By simply adding multiplayer you could easily triple the asking price, even quadruple.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for such detailed feedback!! I am planning on adding achievements, as well as the table height and force grab, but I decided to get multiplayer working first since that seems to be a popular request!

reviews.review_description: This game pretty much nails what I’ve always wanted… a basement dedicated to physical arcade games. I like putting some music on, then just jamming some skeeball and chasing the high score.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for leaving feedback!

reviews.review_title: Very realistic simulation and great fun
reviews.review_description: This developer has figured out how to create the illusion of rolling a weighted ball — not a balloon, in 3 variations of Skee-Ball that are fun to play and challenging enough to be addictive. Love how this looks on the new Quest 3. The games are set in a nicely designed recreation room that has room for additional games that I’m hoping will be introduced but in its current beta stage this is certainly worth the $5 price.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the feedback! I'm hoping to have new machines ready soon!

reviews.review_description: I can't even start a new game of skeeball. Complete TRASH. Requesting a REFUND

developer_response.body:
Hello PhrozenSmoke,
I'm sorry to hear that you were unable to start a game. Based on your review I'm including some improvements to interacting with buttons in the game, which will be in the next update. Thank you for the input!

reviews.review_title: Just like when I was a Kid
reviews.review_description:
You have three different styles of Skeeball to play. The standard skeeball game, a knock down the docks and one like darts.  

Three really fun but still difficult games. 

I have recommended this games to m6 Facebook friends.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Since the update this game works perfect like playing the real game. Great job on the update.

developer_response.body: I am so happy to hear that! Thank you for the review!

reviews.review_description: I don’t write a lot of reviews but I need to give this one a big thumbs up. It’s simple and does exactly what I was looking for. The physics are good, the visuals are good. It’s a lot of fun and I soon forget it’s a VR game. Good job dev!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! I'm so glad you enjoy the game!!
